name: Doteli
notes: Doteli (डोटेली), an Indo-Aryan language of the Sudurpashchim (far-western) province of Nepal, closely related to Kumaoni and Nepali. STUB: the grapheme inventory is NOT yet specified. Script: Devanagari, an abugida — consonant letters carry an inherent vowel cancelled by virama ⟨्⟩ and overridden by matras. A full spec needs Doteli-specific inherent-vowel/schwa realisation, conjunct handling, and anusvara/candrabindu nasalisation; the language is under-described and no published normative letter-to-phoneme table was found. Input is assumed to be Devanagari.

sources.author: Wikipedia contributors
